name: health-check-ai
description: MEOK AI Labs — HTTP endpoint health monitoring, SSL checks, and uptime tracking.

tools.name: check_endpoint
tools.description: Check if a URL endpoint is responding. Returns status code, latency, headers, and health assessment.

tools.name: batch_check
tools.description: Check multiple URLs (comma-separated). Returns status for each with summary statistics.

tools.name: get_uptime_report
tools.description: Get uptime report for a monitored URL based on check history, including availability and latency trends.

tools.name: configure_monitor
tools.description: Configure a URL monitor with thresholds for alerting and tracking.
